channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Oil prices jump as US, Iran trade fire in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Brent crude rises amid clashes in critical waterway.

item.title: The Palestinian shot dead hours before his son was born
item.description: Nayef Samaro, 26 was shot dead hours before his son was born.

item.title: Tennessee approves map dismantling majority-Black district
item.description: Tennessee has approved a new congressional map that breaks apart a majority-Black district centred on Memphis.

item.title: Seafarers trapped in limbo as US and Iran clash in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Some 20,000 seafarers are stranded in the Gulf amid the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Iran war live: Trump says ceasefire still ‘in effect’ as Iran, US clash
item.description: Iran accuses the US of violating the ceasefire by targeting Iranian vessels and carrying out strikes on coastal areas.

item.title: Are global alliances fracturing?
item.description: From NATO to OPEC, global alliances seem strained like never before.

item.title: Huge fire at Mexican fair kills five people
item.description: At least five people were killed after a massive fire broke out at a fairground in Villahermosa, southeastern Mexico.

item.title: Barcelona vs Real Madrid: El Clasico – La Liga, history, Valverde, Mbappe
item.description: Barca are set to storm La Liga this year and could seal title in Sunday's Clasico, but what is history of Real rivalry?

item.title: Videos show interceptions over the skies of Tehran
item.description: Iranian state media says air defence systems were activated in western Tehran as multiple explosions were reported.

item.title: Real Madrid’s Valverde hospitalised with head injury after Tchouameni fight
item.description: Real's turbulent season takes another twist on eve of El Clasico with Federico Valverde hurt in dressing room clash.

item.title: US trade court rules against Trump’s 10 percent global tariffs
item.description: The court ruled in favour of small businesses that challenged the tariffs that took place in February.

item.title: Tenerife resort town awaits hantavirus-hit cruise ship
item.description: Locals react to cruise ship affected by a hantavirus outbreak which is set to dock in southern Tenerife.

item.title: Tennessee approves new congressional map in latest redistricting flurry
item.description: Republicans pass new map ahead of midterms after US Supreme Court weakened Voting Rights Act restrictions.

item.title: Iran says it attacked US Navy ships after they targeted Iranian tanker
item.description: US military says it intercepted and responded to 'unprovoked' Iranian attack, stressing that it doesn't seek escalation.

item.title: Trump sets July 4 deadline for EU tariff hike decision
item.description: Trump claimed he had a 'great call' European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen about the looming tariffs.

item.title: Senators press US military on Israel’s displacement campaign in Lebanon
item.description: In letter to CENTCOM commander, 12 Democrats raise questions about possible US role in Israel's 'mass evacuation zones'.

item.title: Armed fighters kill at least 30 people in attacks in central Mali
item.description: Several sources tell Reuters and AFP the al-Qaeda-affiliated assailants hit two villages in Mopti region on Wednesday.

item.title: Palestinians expose torture and sexual violence in Israeli detention
item.description: Palestinian detainees and rights groups share disturbing accounts of rape, sexual violence and physical abuse.

item.title: Kenyan villagers sue BP over pollution from 1980s oil exploration
item.description: Villagers in Kenya are suing British Petroleum, saying oil exploration by Amoco in the 1980s left toxic pollution.

item.title: Palestinian boy mourns father killed in Israeli strike on security post
item.description: A Palestinian boy mourns his father, one of three people killed in an Israeli strike on a security post in Gaza.

item.title: US issues new Cuba sanctions as UN experts warn of ‘energy starvation’
item.description: Latest sanctions target military-controlled conglomerate, come as effective US fuel blockade continues.

item.title: ‘This is my last voice note’: how piracy returned to Somalia and Yemen
item.description: Three ships were hijacked near the Gulf of Aden, raising alarms over key sea routes. Is piracy returning to Somalia?

item.title: Gulf states urge UN action to ensure Strait of Hormuz safety
item.description: Draft resolution demands Iran halt attacks, pin-point mines and ensure passage of humanitarian aid through strait.

item.title: Can China help end the Iran war?
item.description: Chinese and Iranian foreign ministers meet while a tense ceasefire holds.

item.title: Inside the Israeli bloc that could topple Netanyahu
item.description: Netanyahu’s rivals unite ahead of elections, but is this alliance strong enough to actually unseat him?
